message:
fix(glamour): saturate StyleCache zero capacity instead of panicking

Replace the expect/panic in StyleCache::with_capacity(0) with
NonZeroUsize::MIN saturation so callers passing 0 get a functional
1-entry cache instead of a crash at runtime.

- with_capacity(0) now silently clamps to capacity 1 via
  NonZeroUsize::new(capacity).unwrap_or(NonZeroUsize::MIN)
- Replaced #[should_panic] test with test_style_cache_zero_capacity_saturates_to_one
  that verifies capacity == 1, exercises the cache with two distinct styles,
  and asserts the LRU eviction keeps only the most recent entry

Also syncs .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
